description_long: This is a compact hand tool with a cylindrical wooden handle that tapers slightly towards the metal head. The head features a small, circular cutting wheel and a notched metal section, suggesting it is a glass cutter rather than a traditional wrench. The handle is worn, showing signs of use, and is attached to the metal head with a metallic collar. The metal head is robust and functional, with a utilitarian finish and no decorative elements. The tool is small and lightweight, designed for precise manual tasks. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with visible wear on the handle and some discoloration on the metal parts.
description: A small hand tool with a wooden handle and a metal head featuring a circular cutting wheel, showing signs of wear and use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular cutting wheel and the notched metal head, with the handle receding away.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the wooden handle and the profile of the metal head and wheel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the end of the wooden handle and the back of the metal head.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the handle's curvature and the side profile of the metal head and wheel.
attribute_rust_or_wear_marks: Visible wear marks on the wooden handle and some discoloration on the metal head, but no significant rust.
